query:
SELECT COUNT(*)
            FROM reminders
            WHERE user_id = $1
              AND (
                  -- One-shot: not sent AND not stale (older than 1h missed window)
                  (kind IN ('event', 'timer') 
                    AND last_sent_at IS NULL 
                    AND remind_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour')
                  OR
                  -- Recurring: series not exhausted
                  (kind = 'recurring' AND remind_at <= repeat_until)
              )
